Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11261 0 0}Hey, we should organize an outdoor sketching session one of these days.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 6 -1 0 0}Well, we probably wouldn't have been able to set something like that up anyways...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11282 0 0}{f 5 13 11 30 108}I don't know if we could actually do it or not, but I think it's a fun idea.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}...But it sounds like fun, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11243 0 0}Oh, sorry. So what should we do next? Should we get something to eat?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The two of us hung out for a while longer[n]and then I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
